summary.en: Software for robotaxi operations.
summary.zh: 用於robotaxi(自駕計程車)營運的軟體。

highlight.en: Passenger AI focused on the operational software layer that robotaxi fleets need to run, rather than building the autonomous vehicles themselves.
highlight.zh: Passenger AI 專注於robotaxi車隊營運所需的軟體層,而非自行打造自駕車輛本身。

summary.en: Open source tools that make APIs more developer-friendly.
summary.zh: 讓API更易於開發者使用的開源工具。

highlight.en: Optic applies Git-style version control and code review to API behavior, letting teams document changes and catch breaking changes before they reach production.
highlight.zh: Optic 將 Git 風格的版本控制與程式碼審查套用於 API 行為,讓團隊記錄變更並在破壞性變更進入正式環境前攔截。

summary.en: New clinical tests to guide autoimmune disease treatment.
summary.zh: 用於指導自體免疫疾病治療的新型臨床檢測。

highlight.en: Coral combines molecular, functional, and clinical data to predict optimal autoimmune therapies and to flag patients who don't respond to current treatments.
highlight.zh: Coral 結合分子、功能與臨床數據,預測最適合的自體免疫療法,並標記出對現有治療無反應的患者族群。

summary.en: Student loan repayment offered as an employee benefit.
summary.zh: 以員工福利形式提供的學生貸款還款方案。

highlight.en: Goodly let employers contribute to their staff's student loan payments, turning debt relief into a recruiting and retention benefit.
highlight.zh: Goodly 讓雇主為員工的學生貸款還款提供補助,將減債轉化為招募與留任的福利。

summary.en: A consumer brand now part of thentwrk.com.
summary.zh: 一個消費者品牌,現已併入 thentwrk.com。

highlight.en: Demeanor.co was a consumer company that has since been absorbed into thentwrk.com.
highlight.zh: Demeanor.co 是一家消費者公司,後續已被併入 thentwrk.com。

summary.en: Developer handoff reimagined for Storybook.
summary.zh: 為 Storybook 重新打造的開發者交接工具。

highlight.en: Contrast connects Storybook stories, design tokens, and Figma components so frontend developers can inspect designs with confidence and speed.
highlight.zh: Contrast 串接 Storybook stories、design tokens 與 Figma 元件,讓前端開發者能更有信心且快速地檢視設計。

summary.en: Replacing organ transplant with a cell infusion.
summary.zh: 以細胞輸注取代器官移植。

highlight.en: Hepatx develops regenerative medicine to repair diseased liver tissue, aiming to free patients from chronic liver disease without a transplant.
highlight.zh: Hepatx 開發再生醫學療法以修復受損的肝臟組織,目標是讓患者擺脫慢性肝病而無需移植。

summary.en: Cancer tests that tell doctors whether treatment worked.
summary.zh: 告訴醫生治療是否奏效的癌症檢測。

highlight.en: Clear Gene builds diagnostic tests designed to help eradicate cancer by confirming for doctors whether they fully removed or treated it.
highlight.zh: Clear Gene 開發診斷檢測,協助醫生確認癌症是否已被完全清除或治療,以助於根除癌症。

summary.en: A cure for hair loss by growing new hair.
summary.zh: 透過長出新頭髮來治療掉髮。

highlight.en: dNovo uses cellular reprogramming pioneered at Stanford and Harvard to convert a patient's own cells into new hair, rather than just preserving existing hair.
highlight.zh: dNovo 運用源自史丹佛與哈佛的細胞重編程技術,將患者自身細胞轉化為新頭髮,而非僅維持既有頭髮。

summary.en: An AI creative apprentice that generates visuals in your style.
summary.zh: 依你的風格生成視覺內容的 AI 創意助手。

highlight.en: Aesthetic trains on a user's unique style to generate high-quality visuals that match their look in seconds.
highlight.zh: Aesthetic 學習使用者獨特的風格,在數秒內生成符合其調性的高品質視覺內容。

summary.en: A single hub for all your user research.
summary.zh: 集中管理所有使用者研究的中樞平台。

highlight.en: User Hero centralizes studies, interview transcription, collaborative notes, and tagging, auto-generating reports and rainbow charts for teams.
highlight.zh: User Hero 集中管理研究專案、訪談逐字稿、協作筆記與標籤,並為團隊自動生成報告與彩虹圖表。

summary.en: Affordable expertise for parents raising special needs children.
summary.zh: 為特殊需求孩童家長提供平價的專業協助。

highlight.en: ExceptionALLY aimed to make professional special-needs parenting guidance affordable and accessible to families.
highlight.zh: ExceptionALLY 致力於讓特殊需求育兒的專業指導變得平價且容易取得。

summary.en: Distributed AI for industrial process monitoring and optimization.
summary.zh: 用於工業流程監控與優化的分散式 AI。

highlight.en: numericcal runs ML on unstructured video and audio across edge and multiple clouds, cutting costs while processing far more data than cloud-only tools.
highlight.zh: numericcal 在邊緣端與多雲環境上對非結構化的影像與音訊資料執行機器學習,降低營運成本,同時處理遠超純雲端方案的資料量。

summary.en: A line of premium laundry and clothing care products.
summary.zh: 一系列高級洗衣與衣物保養產品。

highlight.en: FREY makes environmentally safer clothing care products and runs a Wash for Wash program that washes clothing for people in need with each purchase.
highlight.zh: FREY 製造對環境更友善的衣物保養產品,並推行「以洗助洗」計畫,每售出一瓶就為有需要的人清洗衣物。

summary.en: Mobile QVC-style shopping for Gen Z.
summary.zh: 為 Z 世代打造的行動版 QVC 購物。

highlight.en: ShopWith reimagined home-shopping TV as a mobile, video-driven commerce experience aimed at a Gen Z audience.
highlight.zh: ShopWith 將電視購物重新打造成以影片驅動、瞄準 Z 世代的行動購物體驗。

summary.en: An augmented reality app to try on and buy tattoos.
summary.zh: 一款用擴增實境試戴並購買刺青的手機應用。

highlight.en: INKHUNTER let users preview tattoo designs on their own skin in augmented reality before deciding to buy them.
highlight.zh: INKHUNTER 讓使用者在決定購買前,透過擴增實境在自己皮膚上預覽刺青圖案。

summary.en: Location-based dynamic digital out-of-home advertising.
summary.zh: 以地點為基礎的動態數位戶外廣告。

highlight.en: Grabb-It delivered dynamic, location-targeted out-of-home advertising designed to update based on where the display was.
highlight.zh: Grabb-It 提供動態且以地點為目標的戶外廣告,能依顯示位置即時調整內容。

summary.en: Instant, fresh ethnic food that tastes homemade.
summary.zh: 即食、新鮮且吃起來像家常菜的異國料理。

highlight.en: The Buttermilk Company sells packets of fresh, preservative-free ingredients for authentic five-minute meals, sharing sales with the recipe creators.
highlight.zh: The Buttermilk Company 以直接面對消費者方式販售裝有真實、無防腐劑食材的料理包,五分鐘即可做出道地餐點,並將部分銷售回饋給提供食譜的人。

summary.en: Helping public companies communicate with investors.
summary.zh: 協助上市公司與投資人溝通。

highlight.en: BHRD ("Be Heard") built tools to help public companies improve how they communicate with their investors.
highlight.zh: BHRD(取「Be Heard,被聽見」之意)打造工具,協助上市公司改善與投資人的溝通方式。

summary.en: Improving surgical precision with safe electrical stimulation.
summary.zh: 以安全的電刺激提升手術精準度。

highlight.en: Founded by the surgeon who invented it, Allotrope's stimulation tool helps surgeons identify hidden structures like ureters using their existing instruments.
highlight.zh: 由發明該技術的外科醫師創立,Allotrope 的電刺激工具讓外科醫師能用既有器械辨識輸尿管等隱藏的解剖結構。

summary.en: A penetration testing and bug bounty platform.
summary.zh: 一個滲透測試與漏洞獎勵平台。

highlight.en: Federacy provides a combined platform for penetration testing and bug bounty programs to help companies find security vulnerabilities.
highlight.zh: Federacy 提供結合滲透測試與漏洞獎勵計畫的平台,協助公司找出安全漏洞。

summary.en: An audio learning assistant for teachers and students.
summary.zh: 為教師與學生打造的語音學習助手。

highlight.en: AskMyClass (now Soundkins) uses smart speakers like Alexa to help teachers manage classrooms and support social-emotional learning and lessons.
highlight.zh: AskMyClass(現名 Soundkins)運用 Alexa 等智慧音箱,協助教師管理課堂並支援社會情緒學習與教學。

summary.en: Creating the digital outdoor environment for movies.
summary.zh: 為電影打造數位的戶外環境。

highlight.en: Ixora built digital outdoor environments used in film production.
highlight.zh: Ixora 打造用於電影製作的數位戶外環境。

summary.en: A GraphQL API to connect all of the internet's APIs.
summary.zh: 一個串接全網際網路 API 的 GraphQL API。

highlight.en: OneGraph unified services like Twitter, GitHub, Stripe, and Salesforce behind a single GraphQL API, and was acquired by Netlify in Q4 2021.
highlight.zh: OneGraph 將 Twitter、GitHub、Stripe、Salesforce 等服務統合於單一 GraphQL API 之後,並於 2021 年第四季被 Netlify 收購。

summary.en: Live, interactive TV shows for mobile.
summary.zh: 為行動裝置打造的即時互動電視節目。

highlight.en: FameGame produced live, interactive mobile TV shows, beginning with an American audience.
highlight.zh: FameGame 製作即時互動的行動電視節目,並先從美國觀眾切入。

summary.en: An AI-powered, unbiased drug discovery system.
summary.zh: 一套由 AI 驅動、無偏向的藥物探索系統。

highlight.en: Synkrino's AI system, SATIS, is built as a powerful and unbiased platform for therapeutic discovery.
highlight.zh: Synkrino 的 AI 系統 SATIS 被打造為一個強大且無偏向的療法探索平台。

summary.en: Democratizing gene therapy by reinventing its manufacturing.
summary.zh: 透過重塑製造方式讓基因治療普及化。

highlight.en: Perception is building a robotic lab to automate gene therapy manufacturing, aiming to produce clinical-trial therapies faster and cheaper for rare diseases.
highlight.zh: Perception 正打造一座機器人實驗室以自動化基因治療的製造,目標是大幅加快並降低臨床試驗用療法的生產成本,以攻克罕見疾病標靶。

summary.en: mRNA therapeutics to extend healthspan, entering clinical trials.
summary.zh: 用於延長健康壽命的 mRNA 療法,即將進入臨床試驗。

highlight.en: Rejuvenation's Stanford-patented mRNA platform targets short telomeres, reversing 5-10 years of shortening per dose and extending mouse lifespan preclinically.
highlight.zh: Rejuvenation 的史丹佛專利 mRNA 平台針對過短的端粒,單次給藥即可逆轉 5 至 10 年的端粒縮短,並在臨床前研究中延長小鼠壽命。

summary.en: Helping retailers and restaurant chains manage repairs.
summary.zh: 協助零售商與連鎖餐廳管理維修。

highlight.en: OpenWrench helps retail and restaurant chains of all sizes manage facility repairs to save budget and time while improving customer experience.
highlight.zh: OpenWrench 協助各種規模的零售與連鎖餐廳管理場所維修,在改善顧客體驗的同時節省預算與時間。

summary.en: Plant-based dairy reinvented from plants.
summary.zh: 以植物重新打造的植物性乳製品。

highlight.en: Spero uses novel process engineering and 21 global patent applications to recreate dairy staples from plants affordably and at high throughput.
highlight.zh: Spero 運用創新的製程工程與 21 件全球專利申請,以平價且高產能的方式從植物重現乳製品主食。

summary.en: Making low-cost versions of high-cost generic drugs.
summary.zh: 製造高價學名藥的低成本版本。

highlight.en: Cost Plus Drugs produces affordable versions of expensive generic medications to lower drug costs for patients.
highlight.zh: Cost Plus Drugs 製造高價學名藥的平價版本,以降低患者的藥品費用。

summary.en: The everything store for restaurants in Latin America.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲餐廳的一站式採購商店。

highlight.en: Frubana operated as an all-in-one supply marketplace for restaurants across Latin America.
highlight.zh: Frubana 經營一站式的供應市集,服務拉丁美洲各地的餐廳採購。

summary.en: The largest licensed cannabis wholesale platform.
summary.zh: 最大的合法大麻批發平台。

highlight.en: Nabis is California's leading licensed cannabis wholesaler, serving 300+ exclusive brands with fulfillment, warehousing, payments, financing, and analytics.
highlight.zh: Nabis 是加州領先的合法大麻批發商,服務逾 300 個獨家品牌,提供物流配送、倉儲、金流、融資與數據分析。

summary.en: An upskilling bootcamp for India.
summary.zh: 為印度打造的技能提升訓練營。

highlight.en: Run by IIT Delhi alumni, AccioJob teaches full-stack web development and data analytics with job placement at 300+ partner tech companies.
highlight.zh: 由印度理工學院德里分校校友經營,AccioJob 教授全端網頁開發與資料分析,並與逾 300 家合作科技公司提供就業媒合。

summary.en: Helping African farmers access finance, insight, and markets.
summary.zh: 協助非洲農民取得融資、洞察與市場。

highlight.en: Thrive Agric runs a marketplace for agro-commodities and supplies rural African farmers with loans for inputs plus extension services for better crop insights.
highlight.zh: Thrive Agric 經營農產品交易市集,並為非洲鄉村農民提供購買農資的貸款及改善作物洞察的推廣服務。

summary.en: An on-demand delivery superapp for Iraq.
summary.zh: 為伊拉克打造的隨需外送超級應用。

highlight.en: Lezzoo is an on-demand delivery superapp serving the Iraqi market.
highlight.zh: Lezzoo 是一款服務伊拉克市場的隨需外送超級應用。

summary.en: The SMS revenue platform for e-commerce merchants.
summary.zh: 為電商商家打造的簡訊營收平台。

highlight.en: Postscript powers SMS as a revenue channel for ecommerce, generating over $2B/yr for 20,000 merchants like Ruggable, Dr. Squatch, and Thrive Cosmetics.
highlight.zh: Postscript 將簡訊打造成電商的營收管道,為 Ruggable、Dr. Squatch、Thrive Cosmetics 等逾 2 萬家商店每年帶來超過 20 億美元營收。

summary.en: Simplifying cross-border payments and FX.
summary.zh: 簡化跨境支付與外匯。

highlight.en: Verto connects businesses, liquidity providers, and banks in a marketplace to convert, hold, and send payments across 49 currencies, focused on Africa.
highlight.zh: Verto 在一個市集中串接企業、流動性提供者與銀行,可在 49 種貨幣間兌換、持有與付款,並聚焦於非洲等新興市場。

summary.en: Building payments for the next billion.
summary.zh: 為下一個十億人打造支付服務。

highlight.en: NALA runs two products: consumer cross-border payments to emerging markets, and Rafiki, stablecoin payment rails for those markets.
highlight.zh: NALA 經營兩項產品:面向新興市場的消費者跨境支付,以及為這些市場提供穩定幣支付軌道的 Rafiki。

summary.en: An API-first stock and crypto brokerage platform.
summary.zh: 以 API 為核心的股票與加密貨幣券商平台。

highlight.en: Alpaca is a licensed brokerage whose API lets 100+ companies worldwide embed stock and crypto investing into their own products.
highlight.zh: Alpaca 是一家持牌券商,其 API 讓全球逾 100 家公司能將股票與加密貨幣投資功能嵌入自家產品。

summary.en: Making it easier for B2B companies to transact with each other.
summary.zh: 讓 B2B 公司之間更容易進行交易。

highlight.en: Middesk provides business identity data and state filing tools that help firms like Affirm, Brex, and Plaid onboard and verify other businesses quickly.
highlight.zh: Middesk 提供企業身分資料與州政府申報工具,協助 Affirm、Brex、Plaid 等金融公司快速完成對其他企業的開戶與驗證。

summary.en: The first federally regulated exchange for trading on events.
summary.zh: 首個受聯邦監管、可對事件結果交易的交易所。

highlight.en: Kalshi created a new asset class of "event contracts" as the first CFTC-regulated U.S. futures exchange where people can legally trade on event outcomes.
highlight.zh: Kalshi 開創了「事件合約」這一新資產類別,是首個受 CFTC 監管、讓人能合法對事件結果進行交易的美國期貨交易所。

summary.en: An all-in-one recruiting platform for hiring teams.
summary.zh: 為招募團隊打造的一站式招聘平台。

highlight.en: Ashby combines automation, analytics, and customizable workflows in one recruiting tool used daily by talent teams at Opendoor, Airtable, Duolingo, and Notion.
highlight.zh: Ashby 將自動化、強大的分析與可自訂工作流程整合於單一招募工具,被 Opendoor、Airtable、Duolingo 與 Notion 的人才團隊每日使用。

summary.en: A phone that gives families peace of mind about aging parents.
summary.zh: 讓家庭安心照顧年長父母的電話服務。

highlight.en: Community Phone offers a no-setup landline plus AI check-in calls and a family app to help the 55M Americans over 65 age safely at home.
highlight.zh: Community Phone 提供免設定的市話、AI 關懷通話與家庭應用程式,協助 5,500 萬名 65 歲以上的美國人安全地在家養老。

summary.en: Better self-care through at-home hormone tracking.
summary.zh: 透過居家荷爾蒙追蹤實現更好的自我照護。

highlight.en: Inito enables people to track their hormones at home to support better self-care decisions.
highlight.zh: Inito 讓人能在家追蹤自身荷爾蒙,以支持更好的自我照護決策。

summary.en: A one-stop platform for creators to launch and grow their knowledge business.
summary.zh: 讓創作者啟動並壯大知識事業的一站式平台。

highlight.en: Exly is an all-in-one platform for coaches, trainers, and creators to launch and market courses, webinars, communities, 1:1 consultations, and workshops.
highlight.zh: Exly 是一個一站式平台,讓教練、講師與創作者能推出並行銷課程、網路研討會、社群、一對一諮詢與工作坊。

summary.en: Commitment-free furniture and appliance rentals in India.
summary.zh: 印度免綁約的家具與家電租賃。

highlight.en: Cityfurnish offers a rental subscription for furniture and appliances, serving India's 350M people who rent unfurnished or semi-furnished homes.
highlight.zh: Cityfurnish 提供家具與家電的訂閱式租賃,服務印度 3.5 億名租住無家具或半家具房屋的人口。

summary.en: Background checks and fraud prevention for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲提供背景調查與防詐工具。

highlight.en: Truora delivers background checks, identity verification, and KYC via APIs across six Latin American countries, serving Didi, Rappi, and Liftit.
highlight.zh: Truora 透過 API 在六個拉丁美洲國家提供背景調查、身分驗證與 KYC,服務 Didi、Rappi、Liftit 等市集平台。

summary.en: Intuitive, easy-to-remember short links powered by AI.
summary.zh: 由 AI 驅動、直覺且易記的短連結。

highlight.en: GoLinks brings the internal go/ short-link systems used at Google and Airbnb to every company as a service, with 75% of customer employees using it monthly.
highlight.zh: GoLinks 將 Google、Airbnb 等公司內部使用的 go/ 短連結系統以服務形式提供給所有企業,其客戶員工有 75% 每月使用。

summary.en: Helping health professionals prescribe clinical-grade wellness.
summary.zh: 協助醫療專業人員開立臨床等級的健康處方。

highlight.en: PNOĒ built the first easy-to-use clinical-grade breath analysis device, using a 10-minute non-invasive test to prescribe personalized nutrition and exercise.
highlight.zh: PNOĒ 打造首款易於使用的臨床等級呼吸分析裝置,透過 10 分鐘的非侵入式檢測,開立個人化的營養、運動與身體優化處方。

summary.en: A marketplace for homemade food.
summary.zh: 一個家常料理的交易市集。

highlight.en: Shef connects consumers with local home chefs who cook small-batch meals, creating economic opportunity for chefs while making homemade food more accessible.
highlight.zh: Shef 串接消費者與在地的家庭廚師,後者以小批量烹製餐點,在為廚師創造經濟機會的同時,讓家常料理更容易取得。

summary.en: An end-to-end computer vision MLOps platform.
summary.zh: 一個端到端的電腦視覺 MLOps 平台。

highlight.en: Superb AI provides enterprise MLOps and DataOps workflows spanning data annotation, curation, model training, and deployment to speed up data-centric AI.
highlight.zh: Superb AI 提供涵蓋資料標註、整理、模型訓練與部署的企業級 MLOps 與 DataOps 工作流程,加速以資料為核心的 AI 開發。

summary.en: Ride-sharing for second-tier cities in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲二線城市打造的共乘服務。

highlight.en: Pronto serves cash-based second-tier LATAM cities where Uber's model fails, charging drivers a $59-99 monthly subscription instead of per-ride commissions.
highlight.zh: Pronto 服務以現金交易為主、Uber 抽成模式失效的拉美二線城市,改向司機收取每月 59 至 99 美元的訂閱費,而非每趟抽成。

summary.en: Simplifying payments and compliance for construction suppliers.
summary.zh: 為建材供應商簡化支付與合規。

highlight.en: Handle automates the manual, repetitive tasks across the construction payment life cycle to simplify financial management for suppliers.
highlight.zh: Handle 自動化建築付款生命週期中各種繁瑣的手動任務,為供應商簡化財務管理。

summary.en: Generative AI for hiring frontline workers.
summary.zh: 用於招募第一線員工的生成式 AI。

highlight.en: Landed uses generative AI to streamline the hiring of frontline workers.
highlight.zh: Landed 運用生成式 AI 簡化第一線員工的招募流程。

summary.en: Unlocking the utility of genomics for the world.
summary.zh: 為世界釋放基因組學的價值。

highlight.en: Volta Labs built a digital fluidics platform that automates and scales genomics sample preparation with consistency, freeing scientists to focus on research.
highlight.zh: Volta Labs 打造數位流體技術平台,以高一致性自動化並擴展基因組學的樣本製備,讓科學家能專注於研究本身。

summary.en: Electric airplanes with an all-electric range of 250 miles.
summary.zh: 全電動續航 250 英里的電動飛機。

highlight.en: Heart Aerospace develops electric airplanes designed for an all-electric range of 250 miles.
highlight.zh: Heart Aerospace 開發全電動續航達 250 英里的電動飛機。

summary.en: Helping teams hire better frontline workers, faster.
summary.zh: 協助團隊更快地招募到更優秀的第一線員工。

highlight.en: Emi Labs offers an AI-powered SaaS that engages frontline candidates over text for faster, fairer high-volume hiring at Walmart, Burger King, and Starbucks.
highlight.zh: Emi Labs 提供由 AI 驅動的 SaaS,透過文字訊息與第一線求職者互動,為 Walmart、Burger King、Starbucks 等公司實現更快且更公平的大量招募。

summary.en: A B2B supplier of fresh, healthy packaged food.
summary.zh: 提供新鮮健康包裝食品的 B2B 供應商。

highlight.en: Positive supplies fresh, healthy packaged food to business customers.
highlight.zh: Positive 為企業客戶供應新鮮、健康的包裝食品。

summary.en: Precision medicine for Africans and the global population.
summary.zh: 為非洲人與全球人口提供精準醫療。

highlight.en: 54Gene was an African genomics company working to include under-represented African genomic data in research that could yield medical breakthroughs worldwide.
highlight.zh: 54Gene 是一家非洲基因組學公司,致力於將代表性不足的非洲基因組數據納入研究,以期帶來惠及全球的醫學突破。

summary.en: Glide turns spreadsheets into beautiful, intelligent apps.
summary.zh: Glide 將試算表變成美觀且智慧的應用程式。

highlight.en: Glide is a web-based, AI-first app builder that lets non-programmers create internal business apps from a prompt or spreadsheet, no infrastructure needed.
highlight.zh: Glide 是一個以網頁與 AI 為核心的應用建構工具,讓非工程師能從提示詞或試算表建立內部商業應用,而無需管理資料庫或部署。

summary.en: Creating superior data by making annotation competitive.
summary.zh: 透過讓標註競賽化來打造更優質的數據。

highlight.en: Centaur turns data annotation into an arena where human experts and AI compete, producing superhuman-quality datasets through collective intelligence.
highlight.zh: Centaur 將資料標註變成一個讓人類專家與 AI 競爭的競技場,透過集體智慧產出超越人類品質的資料集。

summary.en: Making EV charging as simple and reliable as LED lights.
summary.zh: 讓電動車充電像 LED 燈一樣簡單可靠。

highlight.en: AmpUp delivers a Tesla-like EV charging experience for long-dwell commercial sites like workplaces and depots, reaching 8th in U.S. Level 2 share in two years.
highlight.zh: AmpUp 為停留時間較長的商業場所(如工作場所與車隊基地)提供類似 Tesla 的電動車充電體驗,兩年內躍居美國商用 Level 2 市場市占第八。

summary.en: Reshaping industrial quality with AI, hardware, and software.
summary.zh: 以 AI、硬體與軟體重塑工業品質。

highlight.en: Overview.ai builds custom hardware, edge AI, and software that give manufacturers real-time visibility to catch defects earlier and reduce factory waste.
highlight.zh: Overview.ai 打造客製化硬體、邊緣 AI 與軟體,讓製造商能即時掌握生產狀況,以更早發現瑕疵並減少浪費。

summary.en: An enterprise SaaS platform for spatial data.
summary.zh: 一個用於空間資料的企業級 SaaS 平台。

highlight.en: Geosite pairs a marketplace for geospatial data like satellite imagery with data management and collaboration tools for commercial and military customers.
highlight.zh: Geosite 將衛星影像等地理空間資料的交易市集與資料管理、協作工具結合,同時服務商業與軍事客戶。

summary.en: QA-as-a-service using actual mechanical robots.
summary.zh: 使用實體機械機器人的測試即服務。

highlight.en: Mobot uses human-supervised mechanical robots to test mobile apps on real devices, automating cases that emulators and existing frameworks can't.
highlight.zh: Mobot 運用由人工監督的機械機器人在實體裝置上測試行動應用,自動化模擬器與既有框架無法處理的測試案例。

summary.en: Building AI-powered NPCs for games.
summary.zh: 為遊戲打造 AI 驅動的 NPC。

highlight.en: rct AI applies deep and reinforcement learning to create dynamic AI NPCs and content for games, built by a team whose prior company was acquired by Baidu.
highlight.zh: rct AI 運用深度學習與強化學習,為遊戲產業打造動態 AI NPC 與生成內容,其創辦團隊先前的公司曾被百度收購。

summary.en: An SSH client with team collaboration features.
summary.zh: 一款具備團隊協作功能的 SSH 用戶端。

highlight.en: Termius is a cross-platform SSH client that syncs and shares servers, terminals, and command snippets through a secure cloud vault for DevOps teams.
highlight.zh: Termius 是一款跨平台的 SSH 用戶端,透過安全的雲端保險庫為工程與 DevOps 團隊同步並分享伺服器、終端機與指令片段。

summary.en: A buy now, pay later company in Africa.
summary.zh: 一家非洲的「先買後付」公司。

highlight.en: CredPal offers buy-now-pay-later financing to consumers across Africa.
highlight.zh: CredPal 為非洲各地的消費者提供「先買後付」的融資服務。

summary.en: Intercom for WeChat to acquire, engage, and retain customers.
summary.zh: WeChat 版的 Intercom,用於獲取、互動並留住客戶。

highlight.en: JuziBot provides smart marketing and sales tools on WeChat, serving clients like Meituan Dianping and Zuoyebang, with 80% acquired through word of mouth.
highlight.zh: JuziBot 在 WeChat 上提供智慧行銷與銷售工具,服務美團點評、作業幫等客戶,其中 80% 透過口碑取得。

summary.en: Helping corporations draft, negotiate, and approve documents 10x faster.
summary.zh: 協助企業以 10 倍速度起草、協商並核准文件。

highlight.en: AXDRAFT turns legal drafting into a mistake-free Q&A, cutting drafting time up to 90% and shortening approval cycles by up to 4 days for 45 corporations.
highlight.zh: AXDRAFT 將法律文件起草變成零錯誤的問答流程,為 45 家企業將起草時間縮短達 90%、核准週期縮短最多 4 天。

summary.en: A sustainable, on-demand rocket network for delivery anywhere in space.
summary.zh: 可隨需送達太空任何地點的永續火箭網路。

highlight.en: SpaceRyde used a stratospheric balloon to launch a reusable rocket emission-free, keeping vehicles in orbit for missions like refueling and junk removal.
highlight.zh: SpaceRyde 利用平流層氣球發射可重複使用的火箭以避免排放,並讓載具留在軌道上執行後續任務,如加注燃料與清除太空垃圾。

summary.en: Exoskeletons to help people walk, starting with children.
summary.zh: 幫助人們行走的外骨骼,從孩童開始。

highlight.en: Founded after a co-founder's nephew was born with cerebral palsy, Trexo builds exoskeletons that let children with disabilities walk, often for the first time.
highlight.zh: Trexo 在共同創辦人的姪子罹患腦性麻痺後創立,打造外骨骼讓身障孩童得以行走,許多人更是生平第一次。

summary.en: FLOWER CO. sells cannabis online.
summary.zh: FLOWER CO. 在網路上販售大麻。

highlight.en: FLOWER CO. is a vertically integrated legal cannabis company offering next-day delivery across many California regions.
highlight.zh: FLOWER CO. 是一家垂直整合的合法大麻公司,在加州多個地區提供隔日送達服務。

summary.en: Cloud development environments with one click.
summary.zh: 一鍵啟用的雲端開發環境。

highlight.en: Okteto creates one-click cloud development environments so developers can build features instead of setting up local environments or debugging prod-only issues.
highlight.zh: Okteto 提供一鍵啟用的雲端開發環境,讓開發者能專注於開發功能,而不必設定本機環境或除錯僅在正式環境出現的問題。

summary.en: Building the system of action for health systems.
summary.zh: 為醫療體系打造行動系統。

highlight.en: Bunkerhill Health is building Carebricks, a Sequoia-backed platform for health systems to create, share, and deploy AI agents for clinical and operational work.
highlight.zh: Bunkerhill Health 正打造 Carebricks,一個獲 Sequoia 投資的平台,讓醫療體系能建立、分享並部署用於臨床與營運任務的 AI 代理。

summary.en: Helping creators monetize their work.
summary.zh: 協助創作者將作品變現。

highlight.en: Buy Me a Coffee is a fast, beautiful way for over a million creators to fund their creative work directly from supporters.
highlight.zh: Buy Me a Coffee 是一種快速且美觀的方式,讓逾百萬名創作者能直接從支持者處為創作募資。

summary.en: An industry leader in building, growing, and operating communities.
summary.zh: 在打造、成長與營運社群方面的業界領導者。

highlight.en: Windwalk specializes in building, growing, and operating online communities.
highlight.zh: Windwalk 專精於打造、成長與營運線上社群。

summary.en: AI-powered sales coaching.
summary.zh: 由 AI 驅動的銷售輔導。

highlight.en: Demodesk's AI sales meeting software summarizes calls, automates CRM updates, and delivers personalized, actionable sales coaching.
highlight.zh: Demodesk 的 AI 銷售會議軟體能摘要通話內容、自動更新 CRM,並提供個人化且可執行的銷售輔導。

summary.en: Secure secrets management to prevent breaches and keep teams moving.
summary.zh: 安全的機密管理,防範外洩並讓團隊持續推進。

highlight.en: Doppler is a central source of truth for secrets across every language and stack, automating security and eliminating config drift from local dev to production.
highlight.zh: Doppler 是橫跨各種語言與技術棧的機密單一真實來源,從本機開發到正式環境自動化安全並消除配置漂移。

summary.en: Using solar and wind power to make zero-net-carbon electrofuels.
summary.zh: 利用太陽能與風能製造淨零碳的電合成燃料。

highlight.en: Prometheus pulls CO2 and water from the air and uses renewable power to make drop-in gasoline, diesel, and jet fuel; American Airlines ordered 10M gallons.
highlight.zh: Prometheus 從空氣中擷取二氧化碳與水,並用再生能源製成可直接使用的汽油、柴油與航空燃料,美國航空已訂購其 1,000 萬加侖的航空燃料。

summary.en: Modern spend management and concierge.
summary.zh: 現代化的支出管理與禮賓服務。

highlight.en: Atlas offers a modern spend management product paired with a concierge service.
highlight.zh: Atlas 提供結合禮賓服務的現代化支出管理產品。

summary.en: Technology for the trucking industry.
summary.zh: 為貨運業打造的技術。

highlight.en: Switchboard uses real-time data from devices on commercial vehicles to give visibility into freight location, routing, and availability across North America.
highlight.zh: Switchboard 運用安裝在商用車輛上的裝置所取得的即時資料,提供北美貨運在位置、路線與可用性方面的能見度。

summary.en: Precision-first therapies for immune-driven illness.
summary.zh: 以精準為先的免疫相關疾病療法。

highlight.en: Endpoint Health develops therapies and therapy-guiding tests personalized to each patient's biology to treat immune-driven critical and chronic illnesses.
highlight.zh: Endpoint Health 開發依每位患者生理特性量身打造的療法與引導治療的檢測,以治療免疫相關的重症與慢性疾病。

summary.en: Develop your CI/CD pipelines as code and run them anywhere.
summary.zh: 以程式碼開發 CI/CD 流水線,並可在任何環境執行。

highlight.en: Dagger is a programmable CI/CD engine that runs pipelines as standard containers, enabling instant local testing, portability, and superior caching everywhere.
highlight.zh: Dagger 是一個可程式化的 CI/CD 引擎,以標準容器執行流水線,實現即時本機測試、可攜性與各環境一致的卓越快取。

summary.en: AI tax filing for complex returns.
summary.zh: 針對複雜報稅的 AI 報稅服務。

highlight.en: Keeper uses AI to automate most tax prep, freeing in-house experts to review and advise, delivering more accurate returns at half the cost of accountants.
highlight.zh: Keeper 運用 AI 自動化大部分報稅準備工作,讓內部專家專注於審查與建議,以傳統會計師一半的成本提供更準確的報稅結果。

summary.en: Talent AI that improves quality of hire.
summary.zh: 提升招募品質的人才 AI。

highlight.en: Searchlight built talent AI focused on improving the quality of companies' hires.
highlight.zh: Searchlight 打造人才 AI,專注於提升企業的招募品質。

summary.en: AI-driven brain longevity and healthcare.
summary.zh: 由 AI 驅動的腦部長壽與醫療照護。

highlight.en: BrainKey is an AI-driven digital healthcare company on a mission to create a world free from dementia.
highlight.zh: BrainKey 是一家由 AI 驅動的數位醫療公司,使命是打造一個沒有失智症的世界。

summary.en: A design system platform that connects developers and designers.
summary.zh: 串接開發者與設計師的設計系統平台。

highlight.en: Supernova interprets design systems from editors like Figma into data and auto-generates code for any stack, updating output automatically when designs change.
highlight.zh: Supernova 將 Figma 等編輯器中的設計系統轉譯為資料,並為任何技術棧自動生成程式碼,當設計變更時還能自動更新輸出。

summary.en: An AI agent that saves you money on travel.
summary.zh: 幫你省下旅遊費用的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Axel finds the best travel deals with negotiated rates and refunds the difference if a price drops after booking; formerly Gordian Software, an airline API.
highlight.zh: Axel 以議定的優惠價找出最划算的旅遊方案,並在訂房後價格下降時退還差額;前身為航空附加服務 API 公司 Gordian Software。
